candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; best direct match for top-line revenue.
This is cost, not revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.
Also a valid revenue label and matches the reported revenue values; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; both are valid top-line labels and should not be summed.

candidates.why: Explicit COGS/cost of revenues line; direct match for direct operating costs.

candidates.row_label: Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental
candidates.why: Looks like direct property/rental operating cost tied to revenue generation, more akin cost of sales than SG&A.
Typical operating overhead component and appropriate SG&A component.
Typical overhead bucket and appropriate SG&A component.

variables.notes: Excluded 'Property Operating Expenses - Real Estate Rental' because it appears to be a direct operating/service cost rather than SG&A overhead. Also excluded 'Reported Operating Expense' because components exist and totals/subtotals should not be used.

candidates.why: This is an impairment line, not a normal recurring R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line is present. 'Impairment of R&D' is excluded because impairments should not be used for XRD.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line; preferred choice for XINT.
Broader finance cost line; acceptable fallback if interest expense is unavailable in some years.
Balancing row, not an actual expense line.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for XINT. Excluded the balancing row.

candidates.why: Income statement line, not book equity.
Semantically good equity label, but preview is empty while a populated explicit total equity line exists.
Explicit balance sheet equity line. It appears to exclude minority interest because 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' equals Total Equity plus Minority Interest.
Includes minority interest, so unsuitable for BE when MIB is captured separately.
Balancing row, not an actual equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total Equity' because it is populated and appears to exclude minority interest, given the separate 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' line.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Explicit balance sheet minority/non-controlling interest line; direct match for MIB.
Combined total, not pure minority interest.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet minority interest line, not the income statement attribution lines.
